2605.25584.title: Acting on the Unseen: Communication-Free Collaborative Filtering for Decentralized Multi-Robot Task Allocation
2605.25584.paper_summary: Multi-robot task allocation usually assumes some combination of communication, known task models, or a coordinator. We study the opposite extreme, a regime common in practice but overlooked in theory, which we name Zero-Knowledge MRTA (ZK-MRTA): a robot team with no prior knowledge (no task models, not even the latent rank), no communication (no messages, no parameter sharing, no coordinator), and only a partial and privately-noisy view of a public stream of teammates' outcomes. A hidden low-rank structure governs which robot suits which task, and there are far more tasks than rounds, so most (robot, task) pairs are never attempted. Yet each robot can act well on tasks it never attempted, and onboard new tasks, by running online low-rank collaborative filtering over the broadcast (SwarmCF). The advantage over any structure-free learner is categorical, not a constant factor: a structure-free learner is provably at the prior-mean error floor on unseen pairs. We prove a matching per-robot sample complexity (Θ(d) versus Θ(n), in the rank d and the task count n), an anytime (cumulative-reward) separation under task scarcity, and a deterministic condition under which decentralized recovery from the masked broadcast is exact (validated empirically). Experiments quantify the value of the broadcast, a positive scaling law (per-robot unseen-pair skill rises with team size), and the strongest masking-robustness and anytime profile among low-rank methods, recovering most (about 80% on earned skill) of a centralized full-communication ceiling, and holding under capacity-1 contention and in a robotics-grounded sensing instance.
2605.25584.paper_summary_zh: 多機器人任務分配通常假設某種形式的通信、已知的任務模型或一個協調者。我們研究相反的極端情況，這是一種在實踐中常見但在理論上被忽視的情況，我們稱之為零知識多機器人任務分配（ZK-MRTA）：一個沒有先前知識（沒有任務模型，甚至沒有潛在的排名）、沒有通信（沒有消息，沒有參數共享，沒有協調者），並且只有對隊友結果的公共流的部分和私密噪聲視圖的機器人團隊。一個隱藏的低秩結構決定了哪個機器人適合哪個任務，並且任務的數量遠遠超過回合，因此大多數（機器人，任務）對從未被嘗試過。然而，每個機器人都可以在它從未嘗試過的任務上表現良好，並通過對廣播運行在線低秩協作過濾（SwarmCF）來引入新任務。與任何無結構學習者相比，這種優勢是類別性的，而不是常數因子：無結構學習者在未見對上的先驗均值誤差下是可證明的。我們證明了每個機器人的匹配樣本複雜度（Θ(d) 對比 Θ(n)，在秩 d 和任務數量 n），在任務稀缺下的任何時候（累積獎勵）分離，以及一個確定性條件，根據該條件從被遮蔽的廣播中去中心化恢復是精確的（經實證驗證）。實驗量化了廣播的價值，一個正的擴展法則（每個機器人未見對的技能隨著團隊規模的增長而上升），以及在低秩方法中最強的遮蔽穩健性和任何時候的性能，恢復了集中式全通信上限的絕大部分（約80%的獲得技能），並在容量為1的競爭和基於機器人的感測實例中保持有效。
2605.25584.author: Alexander Apartsin et.al.
2605.25584.authors: Alexander Apartsin, Yigal Meshulam, Yehudit Aperstein
